findings.title: Possible undefined access on user lookup result
findings.description: findUser() returns User | undefined but the caller dereferences .email without a null check, throwing TypeError when the lookup misses.
findings.suggested_fix: Guard with `if (!user) return null;` before accessing user.email, or use optional chaining: user?.email.

findings.title: Timer not cleared on module reload
findings.description: setInterval handle is stored at module scope but no clearInterval is called on hot-reload, leaking timers in dev.
findings.suggested_fix: Export a disposeCache() that calls clearInterval(handle) and wire it into the dev hot-reload teardown.
